text.text: *Summary:* 3 issues found (0 critical, 0 moderate, 0 trivial actionable). All 3 issues validated as auto-resolved — error conditions no longer exist in the current codebase. No ticket created.

*Auto-Resolved (3):*
- :white_check_mark: *<https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-46|ReferenceError: categoryLabel is not defined>* — `categoryLabel` is now exported from `ontology.ts` and imported in `nav-category-tabs.tsx`; error was from a prior build snapshot
- :white_check_mark: *<https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-45|Error: Rendered more hooks than during the previous render>* (NavCategoryTabsInner) — all 5 hooks are unconditional in current code; triggered by React Fast Refresh HMR when `usePathname` was being added during active development
- :white_check_mark: *<https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-44|Error: Rendered more hooks than during the previous render>* (SearchInput) — all hooks are unconditional in current code; triggered by React Fast Refresh HMR when a `useEffect` was added during active development
*Ticket:* No ticket needed — all issues validated as fixed in codebase
